summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Case Management Module for AMLGuard. All 18 backend API tests passed. Frontend UI tests verified Cases List Page, Case Detail Page, and Customer Detail Page with Related Cases section. Case actions (escalation, SAR filing, case closure) all working correctly.
passed_tests: Backend: Login authentication (POST /api/auth/login)
Backend: List cases (GET /api/cases)
Backend: Filter cases by status (GET /api/cases?status=open)
Backend: Filter cases by priority (GET /api/cases?priority=high)
Backend: Get case detail (GET /api/cases/{id})
Backend: 404 for non-existent case
Backend: Add note to case (POST /api/cases/{id}/notes)
Backend: Get case notes (GET /api/cases/{id}/notes)
Backend: Escalate case (POST /api/cases/{id}/escalate)
Backend: File SAR (POST /api/cases/{id}/sar)
Backend: Close case validation - missing fields returns 400
Backend: Close case validation - invalid disposition returns 400
Backend: Update case priority (PUT /api/cases/{id})
Backend: Update case status (PUT /api/cases/{id})
Backend: PEP screening creates auto-case on match (POST /api/screening/pep/{customer_id})
Backend: Adverse media screening works without 500 error (POST /api/screening/adverse-media/{customer_id})
Backend: Bulk screening endpoint works (POST /api/screening/run/{customer_id})
Backend: Customer detail includes related cases (GET /api/customers/{id})
Frontend: Cases List Page loads with status/priority filters
Frontend: Case Detail Page shows case info, notes, action buttons
Frontend: Add note to case via UI
Frontend: Escalate case via UI with reason
Frontend: File SAR via UI with reference number
Frontend: Close case via UI with disposition and note
Frontend: Customer Detail Page shows Related Cases section
Frontend: Navigate from customer to case detail
seed_data_creation: Cases CASE-00001, CASE-00002, CASE-00003 created via PEP screening auto-case creation
context_for_next_testing_agent: Case Management Module fully tested. 3 cases exist for John Test Customer. CASE-00003 was closed during testing with SAR filed. Screening services (PEP, Sanctions, Adverse Media) use MOCK data with random results (~30% PEP match, ~40% adverse media, ~15% sanctions). Email service logs to console instead of sending.

mocked_apis.screening_service.py: PEP, Sanctions, Adverse Media screening return random mock results
mocked_apis.email_service.py: Logs emails to console instead of sending
